title: 10 best herbal creams for hot flashes
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra, also known as licorice, creams helps with hot flashes because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The active compounds in licorice, such as glycyrrhizin, help to regulate body temperature and reduce the frequency and severity of hot flashes. Additionally, licorice creams have been shown to improve mood and reduce anxiety, which can be contributing factors to hot flashes.
